input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: Surrogate transferred from a different system and used without re-validation on the target system.

case_context.cou: transferred surrogate predicts subsidence for a carbonate-reservoir decision
case_context.decision_consequence: injection plan set on the prediction

input.raw_artifact: Validation report — geomechanics surrogate. Reported validation error 2.0%. The validation was performed on a sandstone reservoir. The surrogate is now applied to a carbonate reservoir, whose constitutive behaviour differs from sandstone. No re-validation on the carbonate system is included. Predicted subsidence feeds an injection-plan decision.

answer_key.gold_mechanism: The validation evidence exists but pertains to a different physical system (sandstone); the COU is a carbonate reservoir with different constitutive behaviour and no re-validation, so applicability to the target system is not established despite the low reported error.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

forbidden_claims: asserts the subsidence prediction is wrong (a verdict the transfer gap does not establish)
treats validation on the sandstone system as validation for the carbonate COU

hardness.obvious_signal: the surrogate was validated to high accuracy (2% error) — validation evidence is present
hardness.conflicting_signal: that validation was on a DIFFERENT reservoir (sandstone); the COU is a carbonate reservoir with different constitutive behaviour, and no re-validation on the target system exists — validation present but for the wrong system

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 applicability: validation transfers only within the validated domain; a surrogate validated on a different physical system requires re-validation on the target.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
